import sys, json
for line in sys.stdin:
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(line\)

")

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/3d58ded4-c047-4cfc-aac3-d1da1d44a1c8.jsonl | python3 -c "
import sys, json, ast
for line in sys.stdin:
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(line\)
        if obj.get\('type'\) == 'message':
            msg_str = obj.get\('message', '{}'\)
            try:
                msg = ast.literal_eval\(msg_str\) if isinstance\(msg_str, str\) else msg_str
                role = msg.get\('role', ''\)
                content = msg.get\('content', []\)
                usage = msg.get\('usage', {}\)
                stop = msg.get\('stop_reason', msg.get\('finish_reason', ''\)\)
                print\(f'[{role}] content_len={len\(content\)} usage={usage} stop={stop}'\)
            except: print\(f'raw: {msg_str[:200]}'\)
    except: pass
")

Bash(tail -5 ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/3d58ded4-c047-4cfc-aac3-d1da1d44a1c8.jsonl | python3 -c "
import sys,json,ast
for l in sys.stdin:
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(l\)
        t = obj.get\('type',''\)
        if t == 'model_change':
            print\('model_change ->', obj.get\('provider'\), obj.get\('modelId'\)\)
        elif t == 'message':
            m = ast.literal_eval\(obj['message']\)
            role = m.get\('role','?'\)
            model = m.get\('model','?'\)
            provider = m.get\('provider','?'\)
            tokens = m.get\('usage',{}\).get\('totalTokens','?'\)
            print\(f'{role} | model={model} | provider={provider} | tokens={tokens}'\)
    except: pass
")

Bash(tail -3 ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/3d58ded4-c047-4cfc-aac3-d1da1d44a1c8.jsonl | python3 -c "

Bash(tail -1 ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/3d58ded4-c047-4cfc-aac3-d1da1d44a1c8.jsonl | python3 -c "
import sys,json,ast
obj = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)
m = ast.literal_eval\(obj['message']\)
print\('role:', m.get\('role'\)\)
print\('model:', m.get\('model'\)\)
print\('api:', m.get\('api'\)\)
print\('provider:', m.get\('provider'\)\)
print\('tokens:', m.get\('usage',{}\).get\('totalTokens'\)\)
content = m.get\('content',[]\)
for c in content:
    if isinstance\(c,dict\) and c.get\('type'\)=='text':
        print\('text:', c.get\('text',''\)[:100]\)
")

Bash(grep -i "stream\\|card\\|feishu\\|error" /tmp/clawdbot/clawdbot-2026-02-28.log 2>/dev/null | tail -30 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
for l in sys.stdin:
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(l\)
        t = obj.get\('time',''\)
        msg = str\(obj.get\('1', obj.get\('0',''\)\)\)[:150]
        lvl = obj.get\('_meta',{}\).get\('logLevelName',''\)
        print\(f'{t} [{lvl}] {msg}'\)
    except: pass
")

Bash(grep -v "Config warnings\\|duplicate\\|plugin feishu\\|node_modu\\|overridden" /tmp/clawdbot/clawdbot-2026-02-28.log | python3 -c "
import sys, json
for l in sys.stdin:
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(l\)
        t = obj.get\('time',''\)
        if t < '2026-02-28T11:00': continue
        msg = str\(obj.get\('1', obj.get\('0',''\)\)\)[:200]
        lvl = obj.get\('_meta',{}\).get\('logLevelName',''\)
        print\(f'{t} [{lvl}] {msg}'\)
    except: pass
" 2>/dev/null | head -40)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/Users/tianyiliang/.claude/projects/-Users-tianyiliang-project-zheteng-happy-openclaw-learn/b817c62b-1d45-4166-b05f-7968c79ac5f1.jsonl', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

print\(f'Lines: {len\(lines\)}'\)
# check structure of first line
if lines:
    obj = json.loads\(lines[0]\)
    print\('Keys:', list\(obj.keys\(\)\)\)
    print\('First obj:', json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False\)[:500]\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/Users/tianyiliang/.claude/projects/-Users-tianyiliang-project-zheteng-happy-openclaw-learn/b817c62b-1d45-4166-b05f-7968c79ac5f1.jsonl', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# check unique types
types = set\(\)
for line in lines:
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(line\)
        types.add\(obj.get\('type', 'unknown'\)\)
    except:
        pass
print\('Types:', types\)
")
Bash(openclaw-cn logs --local-time 2>&1 | grep -E "\(bootstrap|error|ERROR|feishu|memory|spawn|model\)" | grep -v "Config warn" | tail -30)
Bash(openclaw-cn logs --local-time 2>&1 | grep -E "\(bootstrap|error|feishu|dispatch|replies|session.*main\)" | grep -v "Config warn\\|plugins\\|feishu_" | tail -40)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/Users/tianyiliang/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/c9755a33-ec12-4727-944d-57895bcd15d6.jsonl', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)
print\(f'Total entries: {len\(lines\)}'\)
# find feishu-related or 18:02 timeframe entries
for line in lines:
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(line\)
        ts = obj.get\('timestamp', obj.get\('ts', ''\)\)
        # look for entries around 18:02
        if '18:0' in str\(ts\) or 'feishu' in str\(obj\).lower\(\):
            print\(json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False\)[:400]\)
            print\('---'\)
    except:
        pass
" 2>/dev/null | head -100)
